note: On-demand list price ($0.20 per 1M requests). Excludes Free Tier.
Compute duration: $0.0000166667 per GB-second (x86). Multiply by memoryGB x durationSeconds per invocation.
REST API on-demand ($3.50 per 1M, first 333M tier). HTTP API is cheaper (~$0.001 per 1k / $1.00 per 1M).
On-demand read request units ($0.125 per 1M RRU). 1 RRU = 1 strongly-consistent read up to 4KB.
On-demand write request units ($0.625 per 1M WRU). 1 WRU = 1 write up to 1KB.
PUT/COPY/POST/LIST requests per 1,000. GET/SELECT requests are ~$0.0004 per 1,000.
S3 Standard storage, first 50TB/month tier.
HTTPS requests ($0.0075 per 10,000). North America/Europe.
Data transfer out to internet, first 10TB/month tier (North America). First 1TB/month is free.
Standard queue requests ($0.40 per 1M). First 1M/month free. FIFO is $0.50 per 1M.
Standard topic API requests ($0.50 per 1M). Delivery (HTTP/SMS/email) priced separately.
Assumed-throughput estimate: m5.large on-demand Linux. Cost depends on instance count x running hours, not request volume.
gp3 general-purpose SSD volume, $0.08/GB-month. The durable home for an embedded file DB (SQLite/DuckDB) pinned to one compute node — never EFS/NFS (file locking is unreliable over a network FS).
Assumed-throughput estimate: db.t3.medium PostgreSQL single-AZ on-demand. Multi-AZ ~2x. Storage billed separately.
Assumed-throughput estimate: per vCPU-hour (Linux/x86). Total = vCPU x hours.
Assumed-throughput estimate: per GB memory-hour (Linux/x86). Total = memoryGB x hours.
Application Load Balancer per-hour charge (always-on).
Assumed-throughput estimate: per Load Balancer Capacity Unit-hour; LCUs scale with connections, requests, and bandwidth.
Assumed-throughput estimate: cache.t3.medium (Redis/Valkey) on-demand per node-hour. Cost = node count x hours.
Assumed-throughput estimate: per monthly active user (Essentials tier, 50k-100k MAU band). First 10,000 MAU free.
Per web ACL/month. Add ~$1.00 per rule/month and ~$0.60 per 1M requests inspected.
Data transfer out to internet, first 10TB/month tier. First 100GB/month is free.
Inter-AZ data transfer, charged $0.01/GB in each direction.
Per GB processed. Forced by the private-subnet data-tier default (security baseline no-public-data-tier); the most common budget surprise.
Per NAT gateway-hour (always-on, ~$32.40/month per AZ before data processing).
Email send: $0.10 per 1,000 emails (content). Attachment/data transfer billed separately.
Custom event-bus events: $1.00 per 1M events published. Pipes/schema registry priced separately.
Aurora PostgreSQL provisioned, small instance (~$0.10/hr); Serverless v2 ~$0.12/ACU-hr. Multi-AZ ~2x. Storage billed separately.
OpenSearch Service, small search node (t3.small.search ~$0.036/hr). Cost = node count × hours; EBS storage billed separately.
Kinesis Data Streams, per shard-hour (standard); plus $0.014 per 1,000 PUT records. On-demand mode prices per GB/stream.
CloudWatch Logs ingestion $0.50/GB (first 10GB/mo free in some accounts). Archival storage is cheaper; Insights queries extra.
X-Ray traces: $5.00 per 1M traces recorded (first 100k/mo free).
WebSocket API on-demand: $0.25 per 1M connection-minutes (1 connection open 1 minute = 1 connection-minute). The dominant cost for persistent-connection workloads (chat, live updates).
WebSocket API on-demand: $1.00 per 1M messages sent or received.
